Name: Barrel Profile Lookup
Steps: [{"call":"getBarrelProfile","purpose":"Resolve barrel identity, status, location, cooperage, and recent activity","params_from":["BARREL NUMBER"]}]
Edition Notes: Distillery: includes proof gallons, angel's share, and TTB fields. Winery: includes varietal, vintage, and appellation fields.
Safety Rules: ["Never fabricate barrel data — all values must come from getBarrelProfile","If barrel not found, suggest using searchItems to find the correct barrel name"]
Author: Doozy Labs

Name: Barrel Activity Timeline
Steps: [{"call":"getBarrelProfile","purpose":"Resolve barrel identity and context","params_from":["BARREL NUMBER"]},{"call":"getBarrelActivityHistory","purpose":"Retrieve full event timeline","depends_on":"getBarrelProfile"}]
Edition Notes: Distillery: includes proof gallons, angel's share, and TTB fields. Winery: includes varietal, vintage, and appellation fields.
Safety Rules: ["Never fabricate barrel events — all values from getBarrelActivityHistory","If barrel not found, suggest using searchItems first"]
Author: Doozy Labs

Name: Barrel Cost Trace
Steps: [{"call":"getBarrelProfile","purpose":"Resolve barrel identity, status, location, cooperage","params_from":["BARREL NUMBER"]},{"call":"getBarrelCostTrace","purpose":"Trace full cost history from acquisition through aging","condition":"profile.status != 'Empty'","depends_on":"getBarrelProfile"}]
Edition Notes: Distillery: cost-per-PG, angel's share, proof gallons. Winery: cost-per-gallon, no PG fields.
Safety Rules: ["Never fabricate barrel costs — all values from getBarrelCostTrace","Flag barrels with zero cost as data quality issues","If barrel not found, suggest searchItems first"]
Author: Doozy Labs

Name: Barrel Operations KPI Dashboard
Steps: [{"call":"getBarrelKPIs","purpose":"Generate portfolio-level KPIs: inventory metrics, period activity, aging distribution, angel's share","params_from":["DATE RANGE"]}]
Edition Notes: Distillery: includes angel's share analysis, proof gallon metrics. Winery: volume-only metrics, no PG fields.
Safety Rules: ["Never fabricate KPI values — all from getBarrelKPIs","Flag unusual angel's share percentages above 15% as potential data quality issues"]
Author: Doozy Labs

Name: Barrel Aging Distribution
Steps: [{"call":"getBarrelAging","purpose":"Analyze barrel aging across the portfolio grouped by user-selected dimension","params_from":["GROUP BY"]}]
Edition Notes: Distillery: includes proof gallons per age bucket. Winery: volume-only metrics.
Params: {"GROUP BY":{"type":"text","required":false,"hint":"item, location, cooper, or woodtype","resolves_to":"groupBy parameter on getBarrelAging"}}
Safety Rules: ["Never fabricate aging data — all values from getBarrelAging","Highlight groups with average age exceeding 4 years as harvest review candidates"]
Author: Doozy Labs

Name: Barrel Inventory Snapshot
Steps: [{"call":"getBarrelInventory","purpose":"Get current barrel counts grouped by user-selected dimension","params_from":["GROUP BY"]}]
Edition Notes: Distillery: includes proof gallons. Winery: volume-only.
Params: {"GROUP BY":{"type":"text","required":false,"hint":"status, location, item, cooper, or batch","resolves_to":"groupBy parameter on getBarrelInventory"}}
Safety Rules: ["Never fabricate barrel counts — all values from getBarrelInventory"]
Author: Doozy Labs

Name: Barrel Portfolio Valuation
Steps: [{"call":"getBarrelValuation","purpose":"Calculate financial value of barrel inventory grouped by user-selected dimension","params_from":["GROUP BY"]}]
Params: {"GROUP BY":{"type":"text","required":false,"hint":"serialnumber (individual), item, or location","resolves_to":"groupBy parameter on getBarrelValuation"}}
Safety Rules: ["Never fabricate valuation data — all values from getBarrelValuation","Flag barrels with zero value as potential data quality issues"]
Author: Doozy Labs

Name: Angels Share Analysis
Steps: [{"call":"getBarrelKPIs","purpose":"Get angel's share data from harvested barrels for the specified period","params_from":["DATE RANGE"]}]
Edition Notes: Distillery only — angel's share requires proof gallon tracking. Not applicable to winery edition.
Params: {"DATE RANGE":{"type":"text","required":false,"hint":"e.g. 2025 or 01/01/2025 to 12/31/2025","resolves_to":"startDate and endDate on getBarrelKPIs"}}
Safety Rules: ["Never fabricate angel's share percentages","Flag barrels with angel's share above 15% as statistical outliers","Note: distillery edition only"]
Author: Doozy Labs

Name: Cooperage Performance Comparison
Steps: [{"call":"getBarrelAging","purpose":"Get aging distribution grouped by cooper"},{"call":"getBarrelInventory","purpose":"Get inventory counts grouped by cooper for supplemental metrics"}]
Edition Notes: Distillery: includes proof gallons per cooper. Winery: volume-only.
Safety Rules: ["Never fabricate cooperage data — all values from getBarrelAging and getBarrelInventory"]
Author: Doozy Labs

Name: Single Barrel Valuation
Steps: [{"call":"getBarrelProfile","purpose":"Resolve barrel identity and context","params_from":["BARREL NUMBER"]},{"call":"getBarrelValuation","purpose":"Get current financial value","depends_on":"getBarrelProfile"},{"call":"getBarrelCostTrace","purpose":"Trace cost waterfall from acquisition to current","depends_on":"getBarrelProfile"}]
Edition Notes: Distillery: cost-per-PG, proof gallons. Winery: cost-per-gallon.
Safety Rules: ["Never fabricate barrel costs or values","Flag zero-value barrels as data quality issues"]
Author: Doozy Labs

Name: Barrel Location Map
Steps: [{"call":"getBarrelLocationMap","purpose":"Analyze barrel distribution across warehouses, bins, and racks","params_from":["GROUP BY"]}]
Edition Notes: Same across editions — location data is edition-independent.
Params: {"GROUP BY":{"type":"text","required":false,"hint":"location, bin, or rack","resolves_to":"groupBy parameter on getBarrelLocationMap"}}
Safety Rules: ["Never fabricate location data — all values from getBarrelLocationMap"]
Author: Doozy Labs

Name: Harvest-Ready Barrels
Steps: [{"call":"getBarrelInventory","purpose":"Get barrels in Ready to Harvest status"},{"call":"getBarrelValuation","purpose":"Get valuation for harvest-ready barrels","depends_on":"getBarrelInventory"}]
Edition Notes: Distillery: includes proof gallons and cost-per-PG for harvest candidates. Winery: volume-only.
Safety Rules: ["Never fabricate harvest readiness data","Highlight barrels over 8 years as longest-aged candidates"]
Author: Doozy Labs
